yes.question: Was the act intended to cause grievous hurt?

no.question: Was the act intended to cause hurt to extort property or constrain to an illegal act?

yes.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act

no.question: Was the act intended to cause hurt to deter a public servant from his duty?

yes.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to deter public servant from his duty

no.question: Was the act intended to cause hurt to extort confession or to compel restoration of property?

yes.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to extort confession, or to compel restoration of property

no.question: Was the act caused by means of a dangerous weapon or means?

yes.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means

no.question: Was the act caused by means of poison, etc., with intent to commit an offence?

yes.name: Causing hurt by means of poison, etc., with intent to commit an offence

no.question: Was the act caused on grave and sudden provocation?

yes.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt on provocation

sections.name: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means.
Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act.
Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to extort confession, or to compel restoration of property.
Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt to deter public servant from his duty
Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt on provocation.
Causing hurt by means of poison, etc., with intent to commit an offence.
Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by use of acid, etc.
